view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for location selection by the customer is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for location selection by the customer is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of 'Location selection by customer' as the linked use case explicitly states that patients can book at any location. Additionally, the evidence from the prior steps shows that customers have successfully booked appointments, confirming that the system allows for location selection. The scenario provided in the use case further supports this by detailing the ability to transfer appointments between locations, indicating a robust handling of location-based services.
